author: Caryn Warner
title: Looking for 2D character artist
content: Looking for a 2D character artist to create a unique and expressive character design. Portfolio links are welcome! My budget is $250 #CharacterArtist #2DArtist

author: Allie
title: Hiring Vtuber model artist
content: Hiring a Vtuber model artist for a contract-based project. my budget 300$ If you create high-quality 2D models, we’d love to see your work. #VtuberCommission

author: Elizabeth Walker
title: Looking for 3D Vtuber artist
content: We’re looking for a skilled 3D Vtuber artist for an upcoming project. Share your portfolio or reach out via DM! #3DVtuber #VtuberArtist

author: Christopher D Eisenhart
title: Artist wanted for comic style squirrel token commissions
content: Looking for artist! Looking to commission two squirrel tokens. One as Tippy-Toe and one as Monkey Joe. I’d like to stick to a comic illustration style! Lmk if you would be interested!
